programme.title: Lakshmi Nivas

programme.title: Tula Japnar Aahe

programme.title: Kamali
programme.desc: S1 , E352 : A courageous kabaddi champion hailing from the countryside of Maharashtra challenges her family's expectations by venturing to Mumbai in pursuit of her aspirations.

programme.title: Calvary Swar
programme.desc: S1 , E67 : A renowned religious scholar delivers a discourse describing Jesus's crucifixion and encourages followers to lead a pious life.

programme.title: Vedh Bhavishyacha 20
programme.desc: S1 , E2212 : An astrologer predicts futures based on zodiac signs and planetary motions, and narrates tales from ancient Hindu scriptures.

programme.title: Kamali
programme.desc: S1 , E352 : A courageous kabaddi champion hailing from the countryside of Maharashtra challenges her family's expectations by venturing to Mumbai in pursuit of her aspirations.

programme.title: Krushnaichya Leki
programme.desc: S1 , E1 : Krushnai, a mess owner, receives the immense privilege of preparing the religious offering for the temple. However, Indurani decides to hatch a sinister scheme to sabotage her efforts.

programme.title: Savlayachi Janu Savali
programme.desc: S1 , E14 : Following Savali's sudden disappearance, Jayanti claims she has run away. Meanwhile, Sarang backs Asmi when she objects to wearing revealing clothes for a round, and Savali tells Jagannath her final choice about marriage.

programme.title: Lakshmi Nivas
programme.desc: S1 , E6 : Lakshmi abandons her affluent roots to build a selfless life with Shriniwas. Decades on, the couple work tirelessly to secure their own house and fund a grand wedding for their daughter.

programme.title: Sanai Chaughade
programme.desc: S1 , E99 : Weighed down by his past, Jay rejects the idea of love. But Sharvari comes into his life and destiny ignites a conflict of beliefs, compelling them to explore if they can mend past scars with love.

programme.title: Veen Doghantali Hi Tutena
programme.desc: S1 , E312 : Samar, a wealthy tycoon, and Swanandi, a young middle-class professional, enter a marriage of convenience. However, their contractual nuptials gradually evolve into a profound connection.

programme.desc: S1 , E353 : A courageous kabaddi champion hailing from the countryside of Maharashtra challenges her family's expectations by venturing to Mumbai in pursuit of her aspirations.

programme.title: Taarini
programme.desc: S1 , E303 : Taarini leads a dual life to avenge her mum whilst grappling with harsh truths that test her resolve as both dutiful daughter and daring undercover cop.

programme.title: Devmanus Madhla Adhyay
programme.desc: S1 , E362 : The notorious serial killer, Dr Ajitkumar Dev, relocates to Varanasi where he assumes the identity of Gopal, a tailor who disappeared years ago, and continues his reign of terror.

programme.title: Veen Doghantali Hi Tutena
programme.desc: S1 , E2 : Angered by Mandakini, Samar swears he will take revenge and his complaint lands Swanandi's family in jail. Soon, a resolute Swanandi heads to his office to confront him.

programme.title: Sanai Chaughade
programme.desc: S1 , E5 : Jay presents Sakshi with a unique present. Later, Samaira, Uma's daughter, who has an aversion to Pramila's family, forces them to take a bus to Akash's wedding venue.

programme.title: Deep Jyoti
programme.desc: S1 , E1 : Honest rickshaw puller Abhijeet enjoys a birthday celebration with his three sisters. Meanwhile, Purushottam holds Deep responsible for Geetanjali's death.

programme.title: Mayabini
programme.desc: When a mysterious presence murders several workers in a forest, an investigation begins to find the perpetrators behind the crime.

programme.title: Satyam Shivam Sundaram
programme.desc: Laxmi, a milkmaid, falls in love with Kanchan, an influential zamindar's son. Things take a tragic turn when his family disapproves of their alliance.

programme.title: Tomai Pabo Bole
programme.desc: Two neighbouring families are embroiled in a bitter rivalry. However, in an interesting turn of events, the son of one family falls in love with the daughter of the other.

programme.title: Chowdhury Paribar
programme.desc: A man expends all his efforts to keep his family together. However, his wife and older brother thwart his plans by creating rifts within the family.

programme.title: Loafer
programme.desc: Bikram is a selfless man who is unfairly hated by his family. However, after an arrest for helping a friend marry, he struggles to gain the respect of those he constantly protects.

programme.title: Mahajan
programme.desc: A powerful landowner conducts his business and lives his life with cruelty. However, various circumstances influence him to change his nature and tactics over time.

programme.title: Mangaldeep
programme.desc: Two best friends, Mangal and Deep, embark on a journey to the big city to fulfil their musical dreams. In his quest to see Deep succeed, Mangal risks everything, including his own finances.

programme.title: Prem Amar 2
programme.desc: College mates Apurba and Joy fall in love with each other. However, their lives take an unexpected turn when Apurba's family forces her to marry someone else.

programme.title: Binashak
programme.desc: A military serviceman learns that his brother is murdered while investigating the illicit activities of a notorious felon. As a result, he embarks on a relentless quest to avenge his brother's death.

programme.title: Cirkus
programme.desc: Two sets of identical twins are separated at birth and grow in two different cities. Years later, chaos ensues when one set of twins decides to visit the town where the other runs a circus.

programme.title: Rustom
programme.desc: Rustom, a naval officer, shares a happy relationship with his wife Cynthia. Soon, he discovers her affair with Vikram, a close friend, and is accused of murdering him.

programme.title: Jersey
programme.desc: A former cricketer in his late 30s returns to the sport to fulfil his son's dream of owning a cricket jersey, battling personal and professional challenges.

programme.title: Bawaal
programme.desc: A small-town man falls in love with the prettiest girl in town. However, he ends up marrying her in order to raise his social standing.

programme.title: Forensic
programme.desc: A police inspector and an eccentric forensic expert investigate the murders of young girls and follow the trail of an unusual serial killer.

programme.title: Krrish
programme.desc: After discovering his father's truth, Krrish must reveal his superpowers to the world and becomes the masked superhero.

programme.title: 14 Phere
programme.desc: Sanjay, a Rajput, is in love with Aditi, a Jat, and wants to get married. However, they realise that their parents would never allow it, so they come up with a cunning plan to get married.

programme.title: Auron Mein Kahan Dum Tha
programme.desc: As Krishna, an incarcerated man, faces early release, his love story with Vasudha from more than twenty years ago unfurls.

programme.title: Article 15
programme.desc: After witnessing rampant caste-based injustice in rural India, a diligent and moral police officer wages war against the system.

programme.title: Blurr
programme.desc: Suspicious about the circumstances surrounding her twin sister's death, a woman with progressive blindness searches for answers that eventually lead her down a dangerous path.

programme.title: Matru Ki Bijlee Ka Mandola
programme.desc: Harry, his daughter, Bijlee, and his assistant, Matru, live in a remote village. Things get complicated when Bijlee, who is in love with Matru, chooses to marry the son of a powerful politician.

programme.title: Operation Fryday
programme.desc: Police informer Ghulam holds the force responsible when his brother gets killed in a gang war. As he then kick-starts his own business, he wrongfully gets involved in a series of bomb attacks.
